title: Create a board template that keeps Outlook automations

posts.author: Romaindel (Romain)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

I created a board template that includes Outlook automations (and other more classic automations).

When I create a table based on the template, the classic automations are created within the table, but not the ones linked to Outlook.

Do you know what might be causing this?

Here are the template automations:

image1530×382 53.5 KB

And here are the automations created in the boards from the template:

image1531×199 27.6 KB

Thank you very much!

Romain

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Romaindel ,

It happens with the template. It only copies over the native recipes but not the integrations.

You can go with the board duplication instead of template.

If you need any implementation support kindly contact us
